rules.title: Global medical traceability baseline
requiredDisclaimers: Every clinical or scientific claim must remain traceable to an approved source.
notes: Use the evidence dossier and reference manager for traceability review.

rules.title: India UCPMP superlative control
requiredDisclaimers: Comparative or superiority wording requires head-to-head RCT support before approval.
notes: Flag superlatives unless head-to-head evidence exists in the approved source pack.

rules.title: Singapore source currency re-validation
requiredDisclaimers: Any evidence older than 5 years requires explicit re-validation before final approval.
notes: Surface older references as advisory findings for medical review.

rules.title: Dubai Arabic transliteration review
requiredDisclaimers: Arabic transliteration review is required for patient-facing medical terminology.
notes: Highlight jargon so localization teams can confirm plain-English and Arabic consistency.

rules.title: Germany promotional SmPC alignment
requiredDisclaimers: Check every promotional claim against the current SmPC table before release.
notes: Promotional content for Germany should not proceed without current label / SmPC alignment.

rules.title: US boxed-warning / fair-balance review
requiredDisclaimers: Confirm boxed-warning, contraindication, and fair-balance requirements before release.
notes: Escalate branded promotional content for legal and regulatory review when high-risk safety signals are present.

rules.title: UK ABPI promotional substantiation
requiredDisclaimers: Promotional claims must remain consistent with the current SPC and ABPI substantiation standards.
notes: Flag absolute safety or efficacy language and require current prescribing reference alignment.
